name: io.github.augbastos/deputy-mcp
title: Deputy
description: MCP server for Deputy workforce management: rosters, timesheets, and shift tools

environmentVariables.name: DEPUTY_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Deputy permanent access token (Business settings -> Integrations -> API access).

environmentVariables.name: DEPUTY_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Your Deputy install URL, e.g. https://your-company.eu.deputy.com

environmentVariables.name: DEPUTY_ALLOW_WRITES
environmentVariables.description: Set to true to enable the opt-in write tools. Read-only by default.
